title: Dalek Mod: Module Cabinets
description: A Dalek Mod addon that adds wireless new blocks to store and access your waypoint modules in your TARDIS, for ease of access!
body:
# DM Module Cabinets Addon
A [Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) addon that adds a wireless new block to store your waypoint modules in your TARDIS, for ease of access!

Here is a video showing it off!
<iframe width="1143" height="643" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/yDfTpLD8-Ts" title="DM: Module Cabinets Addon" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
